message:
If you set up one thing this month, make it a grab-and-go bag. Five basics that cover most situations:

💧 Water + a few snacks
🔦 Flashlight + spare batteries
🩹 A small first-aid kit
🔋 A charged power bank
📄 Copies of key documents in a ziplock

Keep it by the door — future-you will thank you. What would you add to yours?
